textByHashes.fcb13216f755e3ae8f5acf775acec91c9fb07474: Brother - welcome to the Realm of Memories.
textByHashes.dc013376f7daa854958002b3d0762df4d748001e: Sister - welcome to the Realm of Memories.
textByHashes.4ede3aa65891534c0da0af264c5720b0e00006a5: I worked in a chapel dedicated to our lord, Saradomin. My task was to light the chapel candles, but I couldn't reach them myself and I kept getting dazzled by the light whenever I tried.
textByHashes.75b4e52b785bba04b4a2b881ca0a9bf58495840b: I'd call adventurers from across the world, summoning them to my chapel to do the task for me. I needed them to light the tall candles, but not the short ones.
textByHashes.ff89bd5cb7316469feb8703de46181d7b0e9e791: However, adventurers got confused, and thought they should light the short candles as well as the tall candles, so I made them try again. And again.
textByHashes.4dfbd7a297b88452eca017e6b6016b84d6d25e55: Eventually my chapel was closed down. They said I'd trapped adventurers there for too long. All I wanted was for them to light the tall candles without lighting the short candles!
textByHashes.c5761e562774fb141832aa00aaa889e069bdf030: Anyway, now I live here, and remember the good old days. It is nice to meet you, .
textByHashes.45a5d47a880aae7e732cfddecdbb0f13a943dea2: Yes, it is a common name. I also know of Party Pete, Parroty Pete, Postie Pete, Pirate Pete, Petrified Pete and 'Picarron' Pete. The Makeover Mage has used the name Pete too.
textByHashes.707e697d6ff72354ad77c2b25f0339daba2fb96e: Although we are not related, the shared bond of that name can be a comfort in dark times.
